# Coverage: IMPORT

<!-- GENERATED by `make qa-matrix` — do not edit by hand. -->
<!-- Rows come from docs/qa/invariants/07-import.md; the Covered-by column is
     computed from `// covers:` annotations in the test suite. -->

**7 / 7** invariants in this zone have at least one covering test (**7** verified in the per-PR gate; the rest run nightly — _(nightly)_ below).

| ID | Invariant | Covered by |
|----|-----------|------------|
| INV-IMPORT-01 | Preview/commit parity, dry-run is a no-op: `mode=preview` (default) validates and reports the same insert/update (and ledger) counts a commit would apply, but never calls the commit func — it writes nothing | `backend/internal/assets/import_create_fanout_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/assets/import_create_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/assets/import_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/importcreate/importcreate_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/investments/import_create_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/investments/import_test.go` |
| INV-IMPORT-02 | All-or-nothing: a workbook carrying any field or row error is refused at commit (422) with the commit func never called, and a mid-batch repo failure (e.g. a snapshot row whose shape doesn't match the subtype) rolls the whole transaction back — no position, tag, or snapshot left behind | `backend/internal/assets/import_create_fanout_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/assets/import_create_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/assets/import_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/importcreate/importcreate_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/investments/import_create_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/investments/import_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/repo/investment_import_create_test.go` |
| INV-IMPORT-03 | Create-with-snapshots fan-out is atomic and complete: one transaction writes the position, its resolved tag (or untagged when none), and every seeded snapshot together — across all five position groups and the investment ledger variant | `backend/internal/assets/import_create_fanout_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/assets/import_create_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/investments/import_create_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/repo/import_create_fanout_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/repo/import_create_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/repo/investment_import_create_test.go` |
| INV-IMPORT-04 | Detail-sheet identity resolution: a sole-owner email resolves to a household user id and a tag name to a tag id; an unresolvable email or tag is a `FieldError` (blocks `would_create`, fails commit 422) — never a silent write and never a 500 | `backend/internal/assets/import_create_fanout_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/assets/import_create_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/importcreate/importcreate_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/investments/import_create_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/repo/import_create_fanout_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/repo/import_create_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/repo/investment_import_create_test.go` |
| INV-IMPORT-05 | Per-row parsing is strict: a malformed month/number/value-shape is a `RowError` (not a silent skip or a coerced value), genuinely blank rows are skipped, a duplicate month is flagged, and an exported workbook round-trips back through Parse unchanged | `backend/internal/assets/import_create_fanout_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/assets/import_create_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/investments/import_create_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/snapshotimport/importer_test.go` |
| INV-IMPORT-06 | The client drop zone accepts only a spreadsheet: a file is `.xlsx` by extension (case-insensitive) or by the spreadsheet MIME, a multi-file drop takes the first, a non-xlsx drop is rejected `invalid` and an empty drop is `empty` — a frontend-native guardrail before any upload (the backend's "not a spreadsheet is 400" is the server-side twin) | `frontend/src/lib/importDrop.test.ts` |
| INV-IMPORT-07 | Import entry points are ownership-gated: the template-download/meta and import paths resolve a position only within the caller's household; an unknown or cross-household id is `ErrNotFound` (404) — never a template leak or a write into another household's position (the import-side face of INV-TENANCY) | `backend/internal/assets/import_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/investments/import_test.go`<br>`backend/internal/repo/import_meta_test.go` |
